name: pages-seo-v1
description: Self-hosted programmatic-SEO + daily-AI-blog toolkit for Cloudflare Pages. Workers AI default, 8 cloud providers as fallback.
author: Benjamin Bloch <hi@benjaminb.xyz> (https://benjaminb.xyz)

scripts.deploy: npm run bundle-schema && npx wrangler pages deploy public
scripts.db:console: npx wrangler d1 execute pages-seo --remote --command="SELECT count(*) AS posts FROM blog_posts"

cloudflare.comment: Descriptions surfaced by the Deploy to Cloudflare button (https://deploy.workers.cloudflare.com) when a user clicks deploy. They map to keys in .env.example. By default every key in .env.example is commented out, so the deploy flow shows zero secret prompts — pages-seo auto-generates everything it needs on first run. These descriptions only render if someone forks the repo and uncomments a key.

SITE_NAME.description: Optional. Display name for your site (used in titles, OG tags, RSS). Leave blank to auto-detect from the request host.

SITE_URL.description: Optional. Canonical URL of your site. Leave blank to auto-detect from the request host.

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Optional. 64-char random hex used to authenticate admin requests and sign session cookies. Leave blank — pages-seo generates one on first visit to /admin and stores it in D1.

INDEXNOW_KEY.description: Optional. 64-char random hex used to ping Bing/Yandex/Seznam when new posts publish. Leave blank — pages-seo generates one on first run.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional. OpenAI API key. Skip unless you want OpenAI as a fallback provider. Workers AI runs by default with no key.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional. Anthropic API key (Claude). Skip unless you want Anthropic as a fallback provider.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Optional. Google AI Studio API key (Gemini). Skip unless you want Gemini as a fallback provider.

GROQ_API_KEY.description: Optional. Groq API key. Skip unless you want Groq as a fast fallback provider.

DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.description: Optional. DeepSeek API key. Skip unless you want DeepSeek as a fallback provider.

MISTRAL_API_KEY.description: Optional. Mistral API key. Skip unless you want Mistral as a fallback provider.

TOGETHER_API_KEY.description: Optional. Together AI API key. Skip unless you want Together as a fallback provider.

CEREBRAS_API_KEY.description: Optional. Cerebras API key. Skip unless you want Cerebras as a fast fallback provider.
